briefs.title: BC Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation takes effect April 2026, clarifying which services need registration
briefs.summary: BC's new Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation takes effect April 13, 2026. It defines which gaming-related services require a licence and which are exempt — such as producing non-electronic gaming supplies or supplies used outside BC.
briefs.action_required: Review the new regulation to confirm whether your gaming-related services require registration before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation takes effect
